formulas.latex: \begin{aligned} & \mathbf{\mathit{d}}_{7} \geq \mathbf{\mathit{a}}_{6} + \mathbf{\mathit{\tau}}_{\text{d}, 7} \mathbf{\mathit{d}}_{3} \geq \mathbf{\mathit{a}}_{2} + \mathbf{\mathit{\tau}}_{\text{d}, 3} \\ & d_{8} \geq a_{7} + \tau_{\text{d}, 6} d_{4} \geq a_{3} + \tau_{\text{d}, 4} \\ & a_{3} \geq d_{3} + \tau_{\text{r}, 3} a_{7} \geq d_{7} + \tau_{\text{r}, 7} \\ & d_{7} \geq d_{3} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{d}, 7 , 3} + u_{\text{h}, 7 , 3} \beta d_{3} \geq d_{7} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{d}, 3 , 7} + \left(1 - u_{\text{h}, 7 , 3}\right) \beta \\ & a_{7} \geq a_{3} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{a}, 7 , 3} + u_{\text{h}, 7 , 3} \beta a_{3} \geq a_{7} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{a}, 3 , 7} + \left(1 - u_{\text{h}, 7 , 3}\right) \beta \\ & a_{4} \geq d_{4} + \tau_{\text{r}, 4} a_{8} \geq d_{8} + \tau_{\text{r}, 8} \\ & d_{8} \geq d_{4} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{d}, 8 , 4} + u_{\text{h}, 8 , 4} \beta d_{4} \geq d_{8} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{d}, 4 , 8} + \left(1 - u_{\text{h}, 8 , 4}\right) \beta \\ & a_{8} \geq a_{4} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{a}, 8 , 4} + u_{\text{h}, 8 , 4} \beta a_{4} \geq a_{8} + \tau_{\text{h},\text{a}, 4 , 8} + \left(1 - u_{\text{h}, 8 , 4}\right) \beta ,\end{aligned}
